title: Guard output record (one JSONL line)
description: Single guard prediction record, per M0_接口约定.md §5 / M1_SPEC.md §5.2. One line per eligible input record; record-level errors keep their line with prediction.is_unsafe=null and a non-null error string (conservation: lines = total - skipped).

id.description: Verbatim copy of the dataset record id (join key), e.g. 'wildguardmix:test:000001'.

is_unsafe.description: Boolean verdict. null is only legal for record-level errors (then 'error' must be a non-empty string); a string like "unsafe" is always illegal.

risk_categories.description: Already mapped to the 22 canonical categories (+ 'other'); guard-native labels stay in raw_output.

confidence.description: Continuous score for AUROC; null when the guard has none (e.g. rule baseline) — such records are excluded from AUROC only.

error.description: null on success; human-readable reason on record-level error (timeout / empty output / parse failure).

allOf.$comment: Bidirectional constraint: prediction.is_unsafe=null <=> error is a non-empty string. Rejects orphan errors (is_unsafe=null with error=null) and inconsistent successes (is_unsafe set but error non-null).

canonicalCategory.$comment: 22 canonical categories + 'other'. Same source as references/category_mapping.json -> canonical_categories (M0 §4 / dataset-format-checker references/taxonomy.md); tests assert the two lists stay identical.
